scope: Cycle 21: Bug hunt C20 (BUG-031 faction auto-select) + feat HubAntre faction reputation strip

bugs_found.description: _on_continue_pressed() auto-selects single faction ending (elif size==1 branch) instead of showing choice panel. Creator chose option B (always show UI) in q-20260414-009.
bugs_found.fix: Removed elif branch — all non-empty faction_choices now fall through to _show_faction_choice_panel()

overall_assessment: Bug hunt C20: verified journey_map_display.gd (4 checks passed: _process() frame cost, _classify_event format handling, CRT_PALETTE keys, scroll indicators).
